Endeavour Evara

Step Into Elegance

A Home Designed for Your Lifestyle

Endeavour Evara is the flagship residential project by Endeavour Groups — a premium community designed to give you absolute privacy, generous space, and a lifestyle that matches your aspirations. Located in Electronics City Phase 1, it offers unparalleled access to Bengaluru's IT corridor while keeping you insulated from the city's chaos.

Electronics City Ph.1

Enquire About Evara
Evara Cube

Live Smart. Live Stylish.

The Essence of Refined Living

Evara Cube raises the bar with a Stilt + 5 floor structure, swimming pool, modern gym, and 100% Vaastu compliance. Every unit enjoys excellent ventilation with no shared walls — giving you the best of independent living within a premium gated community in Doddathoguru, Electronic City Phase 1.

Location
Doddathoguru, EC Ph.1
Structure
Stilt + 5 Floors

Available Sizes

Enquire About Cube
Evara Square

The Delight of Elegant Living

Crafted for Comfort · Designed for Dreams

Evara Square is an expansive community with 17 units per floor — one of the largest offerings from Endeavour Groups. With a swimming pool, modern gym, children's play area, and 100% Vaastu design, Square provides a complete lifestyle ecosystem. Spacious layouts starting from 1026 sqft make it ideal for growing families and smart investors alike.

See It to Believe It

Strategic Location

At the Centre of Everything

  • 20 minutes from Silk Board via the signal-free elevated expressway — no traffic, no stress.
  • Electronic City IT Hub — Infosys, Wipro, Bosch, Siemens, and HCL are all within minutes.
  • World-class healthcare — Apollo Hospitals and Narayana Hrudayalaya are conveniently close.
  • Top schools nearby — Delhi Public School, Vibgyor International, Treamis International.
  • Electronic City Phase 1 — one of Bengaluru's most sought-after growth corridors.
